checks.description: Carry-out Co must be asserted only when the unsigned sum of a, b, and Cin exceeds 16 bits.
checks.pass_condition: Co == 1 iff (a + b + Cin) > 0xFFFF; otherwise Co == 0. Unknown or high‑impedance inputs propagate X/Z per Verilog semantics.
checks.trigger_condition: When edge_001 stimulus applies boundary‑value patterns.

checks.description: Verify that the sum output y matches the unsigned addition of a, b, and Cin for each driven vector.
checks.pass_condition: y == (a + b + Cin)[15:0] for all legal input combinations; X/Z propagation follows Verilog rules when any input is X/Z.
checks.trigger_condition: When basic_001 stimulus applies a representative set of legal input vectors.
